name: Lalamon

signature_move.name: Nuts Shoot
signature_move.description: Shoots hard nuts from its mouth with surprising accuracy.

description: A Plant Digimon which has an appearance like a flower bud. It spins the leaf on its head to fly unsteadily, and is expressionless but charming. Its Special Move is firing solid nuts from its mouth ( Nuts Shoot ). Its aim is surprisingly accurate. Also, it can spin its leaf with all its might to assault the opponent ( Lala Screw ), and put the opponent to sleep with a pleasant song ( Sing a Song ).
